context_text: "You are now our ruler," he said to the Scarecrow; "so you must come back to us as soon as possible.
normalized_context_text: "You are now our ruler," he said to the Scarecrow; "so you must come back to us as soon as possible.

subject: our ruler

context_text: Dorothy then gave her the Golden Cap, and the Witch said to the Scarecrow, "What will you do when Dorothy has left us?" "I will return to the Emerald City," he replied, "for Oz has made me its ruler and the people like me.
